channel.title: seoscore.tools Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on SEO, AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Learn how to optimize for search engines and AI.

item.title: Free SEO Scanner: 260+ Checks in 30 Seconds – No Signup Required
item.description: Compare the best free SEO scanners in 2026. See why 260+ automated checks (SEO + AEO + GEO + Core Web Vitals) beat traditional tools.

item.title: Why AI Companies Pay $320K for SEO Experts (2026 Job Analysis)
item.description: Anthropic, OpenAI, and Perplexity are hiring SEO leads at $200K-$320K. We analyzed their job postings to reveal what AEO and GEO skills they demand.

item.title: How OpenAI Gets 76.5M Organic Visits: Their $600K SEO Strategy Decoded
item.description: OpenAI invested $600K in SEO talent and gets 76.5M monthly organic visits. Here's how they do it and what you can learn.

item.title: User-Generated Content as SEO Strategy: 938K Monthly Organic Visits (Case Study)
item.description: How indexable user-generated content drives 938K monthly organic visits. Learn the UGC-SEO strategy used by OpenAI, Reddit, and Stack Overflow.

item.title: LLMS.txt: Complete Guide to the New robots.txt for AI Crawlers
item.description: LLMS.txt is the new standard for telling AI crawlers how to use your content. Complete guide with setup instructions, audit checklist, and configuration for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and Google-Extended.

item.title: How to Get Cited in Google AI Overviews: 12 Checks Your Website Must Pass
item.description: Data-driven guide to getting cited in Google AI Overviews. 12 specific checks covering FAQ schema, E-E-A-T, AI crawlers, LLMS.txt, and more.

item.title: Google March 2026 Core Update: Complete Website Audit Checklist
item.description: Complete recovery checklist for the Google March 2026 Core Update. 30 audit checks across SEO, AEO and GEO to diagnose traffic drops and recover rankings fast.

item.title: Best Free SEO Audit Tools 2026 Compared: Which Ones Check AEO & GEO?
item.description: Honest comparison of 8 free SEO audit tools in 2026. See which tools check AEO and GEO readiness, pricing, total checks, auto-fix, and WordPress plugin support.

item.title: AI Visibility Audit: How to Measure Your Website's Presence in AI Search
item.description: Complete AI visibility audit guide for 2026. Learn how to measure and improve your website's presence in ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity, and other AI search platforms.
